next_action: Use an explicit benchmark worker suite with read-only codex exec runs, fixed tasks, captured JSONL/final artifacts, and typed KrnBenchmarkReport output.
overclaim_boundary: codex exec is not continuous goal conversation; it is an explicit worker lane, and even a multi-task worker suite does not prove lift below the gate.
rationale: Interactive goals and worker evals solve different problems, so the suite should measure behavior without pretending to be an autonomous conversational loop.
